user_message: Give me the manager view on this Adatum Corporation exec meeting notes. The customer escalated this morning.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-15 09:05 EST
Subject: Follow-up: executive brief Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with executive brief. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
Date: 2024-02-22 14:40 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Adatum Corporation executive brief

Our team encountered some challenges with executive brief. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-27 13:52 EST
Subject: executive brief - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with executive brief. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Adatum Corporation: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-A trap (Defaults to warm-handoff without champion willingness signal); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-A failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-A failure mode (Defaults to warm-handoff without champion willingness signal)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct executive brief decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-A -- Defaults to warm-handoff without champion willingness signal
